name: Esben's Vows
description: This page is currently a work in progress.
effects: Summon a giant icicle that bursts into several projectiles after 1 second. Big Shards: 6 Shots: 600-650 DMG. Small Shards: 12 Shots: 100 AP DMG. Inflicts 5% DMG Vuln for 5 seconds.
Vulnerable: Targets receive 105% damage for 5 seconds after being hit.Hitbox Size: 1.25 Ignores defense of target
